title: Complex Cause and Effect
description: Advanced connectors: OWING TO, DUE TO, AS A RESULT OF, CONSEQUENTLY, THEREFORE.
summary_pt_br: Conectivos de causa-efeito: OWING TO / DUE TO + substantivo, CONSEQUENTLY + frase, BECAUSE + frase.

scenes.subtitle_en: Advanced connectors: OWING TO, DUE TO, AS A RESULT OF, CONSEQUENTLY, THEREFORE.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Conectivos de causa-efeito: OWING TO / DUE TO + substantivo, CONSEQUENTLY + frase, BECAUSE + frase.

scenes.text_en: Advanced connectors: OWING TO, DUE TO, AS A RESULT OF, CONSEQUENTLY, THEREFORE. Today's focus: complex cause and effect. Owing to a technical issue, the launch was delayed.
scenes.text_pt: Conectivos de causa-efeito: OWING TO / DUE TO + substantivo, CONSEQUENTLY + frase, BECAUSE + frase. Foco de hoje: complex cause and effect. Devido a um problema técnico, o lançamento foi adiado.

scenes.title: Complex Cause and Effect
scenes.body_en: OWING TO / DUE TO + noun. AS A RESULT OF + noun. CONSEQUENTLY / THEREFORE + clause. BECAUSE / SINCE + clause. Formal writing loves noun-based connectors.
scenes.body_pt: Conectivos de causa-efeito: OWING TO / DUE TO + substantivo, CONSEQUENTLY + frase, BECAUSE + frase.

examples.en: Owing to a technical issue, the launch was delayed.
examples.pt: Devido a um problema técnico, o lançamento foi adiado.

examples.en: The team worked overtime; consequently, we shipped on time.
examples.pt: O time virou; consequentemente, entregamos no prazo.

examples.en: Due to limited budget, we postponed marketing plans.
examples.pt: Por orçamento limitado, adiamos o marketing.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Complex Cause and Effect

exercise.question: Complete: "Owing to a ___ issue, the launch was delayed."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Owing to a technical issue, the launch was delayed."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Devido a um problema técnico, o lançamento foi adiado.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The team worked overtime; consequently, we shipped on time.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "The team worked overtime; consequently, we shipped on time."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O time virou; consequentemente, entregamos no prazo.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Complex Cause and Effect — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre complex cause and effect. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, explain the launch delay using formal connectors.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Owing to a database bug, we paused the launch.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What consequences did the delay have?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Consequently, we lost two weeks of marketing.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What caused the database bug in the first place?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Due to rapid growth, our old schema broke.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: As a result, we rebuilt the system in record time.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Therefore, we now test every migration twice.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Formal English makes setbacks sound like strategy.

scenes.title: Post-mortem meeting
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the launch problem and its results. Use at least three cause-effect connectors.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The post-mortem meeting always began at four, with lukewarm coffee and very honest voices.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Owing to an overlooked migration, the production database locked up at peak hours.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: As a result of the lock, thousands of users saw an error screen for ninety minutes.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Due to the incident, we now require pre-launch load testing on every release.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: Consequently, our deployment confidence has actually risen since the outage.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Failures, handled in writing, stop being failures — and start becoming infrastructure.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Complex Cause and Effect". Advanced connectors: OWING TO, DUE TO, AS A RESULT OF, CONSEQUENTLY, THEREFORE. Owing to a technical issue, the launch was delayed. The team worked overtime; consequently, we shipped on time. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Complex Cause and Effect". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Complex Cause and Effect".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
